name: lanyasheng--apple-health-csv
description: Query Apple Health data exported as CSV files from iOS apps like Simple Health Export or Health Auto Export. Supports 30+ health metrics including heart rate, steps, sleep analysis, blood oxygen, workouts, body measurements, and more. Fully local — no cloud services, no API keys, no third-party data sharing. Use when users ask about their health data, fitness trends, sleep patterns, or want a daily health summary.
